description: Benzophenone is sweet, aromatic with a faint rose and fruity character
odour: Benzophene has a faint and fresh characteristic with touches of fruits and florals. It has a very faint, powdery-rosy geranium-like odor with a slightly metallic note. Other descriptors: vinyl faint powdery-rosy. On skin by itself, Benzophene will become woodier on the dry down, like a mellow wood that has been lacquered (however, not in an unpleasant way). After a few hours, the wood aroma dissipates, making the rose the prominent feature.
